label: plain_text
text:
7.
Here are six integer cards: (+ 1), (+ 7), (+ 18), (-5), (-2), (-9).
You can pick any of these and make an expression using addition(s)
and subtraction(s).
 (-)-( +)-( +) + ( +) x   
gives a value
(+ 14). Now, pick cards and make an expression such that its value
is closer to (- 30).
